= Home Decorations =
Home Decorations are different than [[Dorm Decor]] for your [[Partners]]. Home Decorations are a way to decorate your [[Home Base]] with skins. You can select these skins by going to the [[Terminal]] and clicking on the weather. Home Decorations give Home Comfort which does not seem to have an in game purpose yet.

= Snail Terminal =
{|class="wikitable"
!Image and Name
!Comfort Amount
!How to Unlock
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Snail Terminal|black|100}}||0||'''Home Initial Settings'''
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|CyberVendor Computer|black|Garage|100}}||+15||Unlocked in the [[Garage]]
|}

= Rocket =
{|class="wikitable"
!Image and Name
!Comfort Amount
!How to Unlock
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Rocket|black|100}}||0||'''Home Initial Settings'''
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Large Carrier Rocket|black|Venture to the Stars|100}}||+15||[[Venture to the Stars]] Sep. 27 - Oct. 10 2024
|}

= Bedroom Tire =
{|class="wikitable"
!Image and Name
!Comfort Amount
!How to Unlock
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Bedroom Tire|black|100}}||0||'''Home Initial Settings'''
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Brave Merman|black|Snowy Day|100}}||+15||[[Snowy Day]] Dec. 22 2023 - Jan. 05 2024
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Family Photo|black|1st Anniversary|100}}||+15||[[1st Anniversary]] Aug. 02 - Aug. 29 2024
|}

= Gear Warehouse =
{|class="wikitable"
!Image and Name
!Comfort Amount
!How to Unlock
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gear Warehouse|black|100}}||0||'''Home Initial Settings'''
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Ultra Shrine|black|Summer Fest|100}}||+15||[[Summer Fest]] Jun. 28 - Jul. 11 2024
|}

[[Category:Home Base]]
